title: Session startup — file reads reported
q_summary: Jared asked Alice to start a new session and report exactly which files were read during startup, in order.
a_summary: Alice read G-009-identity.md and G-001-constraints.md. G-003, brain.json, and inbox were deferred due to 3-slot budget. Full startup summary provided in response.
decisions: Deferred G-003, brain.json, inbox reads to next turn due to tool budget
open_questions: Should startup reads be prioritized over turn-close push when budget is tight?
